T0036.title: Credit Blank
T0036.definition: An individual whose credit file is completely empty, containing no records of loans or credit cards. This pristine credit profile is a commodity in underground fraud supply chains and is actively sold on channels like Telegram, X (formerly Twitter), and Potato for use in loan fraud and money laundering schemes.

T0036.usageExample: 中介说纯白户能贷得更多，让我把身份证给他，他帮我包装申请，下款了分我三成，这会不会是坑？
